name: kagura-plugins
description: Umbrella marketplace for the Kagura Memory Cloud ecosystem — the kagura-memory substrate, atomic review Tools, and orchestration Harnesses, unified under the kagura-ai brand. Reference-don't-vendor: each plugin lives in its own kagura-ai repo.

metadata.description: One entry point for the Kagura ecosystem. Tiers: substrate (memory), tool (atomic, cheap, safe), harness (multi-phase, stateful, costly — creates PRs / HITL gates).

plugins.name: kagura-memory
plugins.description: Substrate · Memory Cloud. Persistent AI memory grounding the whole ecosystem — session-start/session-summary bracket every session; recall/remember/guide used throughout.

plugins.name: kagura-code-reviewer
plugins.description: Tool · Cost-free, Ollama-first code review — multi-angle finders, adversarial verify, structured verdict.

plugins.name: kagura-planner
plugins.description: Tool · Memory-grounded PLAN-layer over Claude Code + Kagura Memory. Thin skill wrapping the kagura-planner CLI (plan / doctor).

plugins.name: kagura-engineer
plugins.description: Harness · Autonomous coding loop over Claude Code + Kagura Memory (run / review / goal). Stateful, resumable, creates PRs, HITL gates — not an atomic tool.

plugins.name: kagura-c-suite
plugins.description: Tool · Executive-team review lenses (CEO/CTO/CSO/CFO/PM/QA-Lead/DX-Lead/…) for any codebase. Single-lens /ask router plus per-role commands.

plugins.name: kagura-phd-panel
plugins.description: Tool · PhD-level review panel (CS / DB / Distributed-Systems / Data-Science / PL / Security / Statistics) for deep technical critique.

plugins.name: gh-issue-driven
plugins.description: Harness · Drives GitHub issues to PRs (start → implement → ship → review) with gates, resumable state, and HITL. Costly, mutates the repo, opens PRs — not an atomic tool.
